title: [MTR 4] Metro 802
description: Adds a metro livery variant for the base IET/802 in MTR
body:
![Image showing the Metro 802 model, taken from the front of the train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VRAy7md6/images/1870c2a438f719126898417409064424829998bd.png)

**⚠️ ONLY COMPATIBLE WITH MTR 4 ⚠️**

---

This resource pack adds the respective train from Stepford County Railway, to the list available in MTR. It is a reskin of the GWR 802.

The pack includes;
  - Front & Rear Cab (Both normal and mini)
  - Standard & Mini Coaches
  - Double trailer

If there's any issues feel free to let me know 

_This pack is not affiliated with, nor a product of SCR_


_Many thanks to **Egamicoo** for providing additional images_
